files.text:
package example

object Decoder:
  def asLong(value: Any): Long = value.asInstanceOf[Long]

package example

object Routing:
  def isString(value: Any): Boolean = value.isInstanceOf[String]

package example

object Decoder:
  def asLong(value: Any): Option[Long] = value match
    case n: Long => Some(n)
    case n: Int  => Some(n.toLong)
    case _       => None
